## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| AddressService/Create | (CreateAddressRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/addresses |
| AddressService/Delete | (DeleteAddressRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id} |
| AddressService/Get | (GetAddressRequest) → Address | GET /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id} |
| AddressService/GetByValue | (GetAddressByValueRequest) → Address | GET /vpc/v1/addresses:byValue |
| AddressService/List | (ListAddressesRequest) → ListAddressesResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addresses |
| AddressService/ListBySubnet | (ListAddressesBySubnetRequest) → ListAddressesBySubnetResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addresses:bySubnet |
| AddressService/ListOperations | (ListAddressOperationsRequest) → ListAddressOperationsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id}/operations |
| AddressService/Move | (MoveAddressRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id}:move |
| AddressService/Update | (UpdateAddressRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /vpc/v1/addresses/{address_id} |
